description: A demonstration of Solana governance tools, focusing on the Mango DAO. The session covers the basics of setting up a DAO, governance structures, and the Mango V3 program functionalities. It includes discussions on treasury control, governance tokens, and future developments in the DAO space.
topic_summary: Introduction to Solana governance tools and Mango DAO functionalities, including DAO setup, governance structures, and treasury management [t=23:36 - 446:86].
